name: NGI Zero Core — Open Internet Technology
eligibility: Free/open-source projects advancing the open internet; individuals and small teams

name: NGI Zero Commons Fund
eligibility: Reusable open-source building blocks for the digital commons
notes: recurring open call, they review in batches every 2 months

title: GG23 Open Source Software Round
eligibility: Open-source projects with public-good impact; quadratic-funding matched

name: Mozilla Technology Fund — Trustworthy AI
eligibility: Projects auditing or improving accountability of AI systems

name: PL Network Goods — Dev Grant
eligibility: Tooling and research advancing IPFS, Filecoin, and decentralized storage

name: Horizon Europe — NGI Search Open Call
eligibility: EU-based teams building next-generation internet search and discovery
notes: EU-based ONLY — check applicant eligibility before pitching

name: Astera Residency — Open Science Tools
eligibility: Builders advancing open, reproducible science infrastructure

name: Regen Ecological Stewardship Grant
eligibility: On-the-ground regenerative land and soil projects with measurable outcomes
notes: part cash part eco-credits (REGEN token) — clarify split w/ applicant

title: Retroactive Public Goods Funding — Round 7
eligibility: Projects that have already delivered measurable public-good impact

name: Open Collective Foundation — Community Resilience Fund
Mozilla Builders Accelerator — Local AI
eligibility: Projects advancing efficient, on-device, and local-first AI
notes: mixed = cash + compute credits + accelerator program slot

name: Climate Solutions Round
eligibility: Open projects addressing climate mitigation, adaptation, or regeneration

name: Filecoin Foundation — Archival Public Goods
eligibility: Decentralized preservation of scientific, cultural, or public-interest data

name: NGI Zero Entrust — Privacy & Trust
eligibility: Open-source projects strengthening privacy, trust, and data sovereignty
